### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Cookie: REDACTED
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.12
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Streaming: true
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Fs-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "netprof/cli/summarize.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof summarize subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\n\r\n\r\ndef summarize_cmd(\r\n    output_dir: Path = typer.Argument(\r\n        ..., help=\"Output directory containing flows.jsonl and transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    ),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Recompute and print key metrics from flows.jsonl and transactions.jsonl.\"\"\"\r\n    out = Path(output_dir)\r\n    flows_path = out / \"flows.jsonl\"\r\n    txns_path = out / \"transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    if not flows_path.exists():\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Not found: {flows_path}\", err=True)\r\n        raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n    flows = []\r\n    with open(flows_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n        for line in f:\r\n            line = line.strip()\r\n            if not line:\r\n                continue\r\n            flows.append(Flow.model_validate(json.loads(line)))\r\n    transactions = []\r\n    if txns_path.exists():\r\n        with open(txns_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for line in f:\r\n                line = line.strip()\r\n                if not line:\r\n                    continue\r\n                transactions.append(Transaction.model_validate(json.loads(line)))\r\n    summary = build_summary(flows, transactions)\r\n    # Overwrite summary.json\r\n    with open(out / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n        f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n    # Print key metrics\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total flows: {summary.total_flows}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total bytes: {summary.total_bytes}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total transactions: {summary.total_transactions}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Active flow peaks: {summary.active_flow_peaks}\")\r\n    lp = summary.latency_percentiles\r\n    if lp.p50_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p50: {lp.p50_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n    if lp.p90_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p90: {lp.p90_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n    if lp.p99_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p99: {lp.p99_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:24:08 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

```
{}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "netprof/cli/summarize.py", "3:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof summarize subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\n\r\n\r\ndef summarize_cmd(\r\n    output_dir: Path = typer.Argument(\r\n        ..., help=\"Output directory containing flows.jsonl and transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    ),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Recompute and print key metrics from flows.jsonl and transactions.jsonl.\"\"\"\r\n    out = Path(output_dir)\r\n    flows_path = out / \"flows.jsonl\"\r\n    txns_path = out / \"transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    if not flows_path.exists():\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Not found: {flows_path}\", err=True)\r\n        raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n    flows = []\r\n    with open(flows_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n        for line in f:\r\n            line = line.strip()\r\n            if not line:\r\n                continue\r\n            flows.append(Flow.model_validate(json.loads(line)))\r\n    transactions = []\r\n    if txns_path.exists():\r\n        with open(txns_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for line in f:\r\n                line = line.strip()\r\n                if not line:\r\n                    continue\r\n                transactions.append(Transaction.model_validate(json.loads(line)))\r\n    summary = build_summary(flows, transactions)\r\n    # Overwrite summary.json\r\n    with open(out / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n        f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n    # Print key metrics\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total flows: {summary.total_flows}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total bytes: {summary.total_bytes}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total transactions: {summary.total_transactions}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Active flow peaks: {summary.active_flow_peaks}\")\r\n    lp = summary.latency_percentiles\r\n    if lp.p50_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p50: {lp.p50_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n    if lp.p90_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p90: {lp.p90_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n    if lp.p99_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p99: {lp.p99_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
```
